name: analyze_vdj_batch
description: V(D)J recombination analysis using IgBLAST + ChangeO. Returns AIRR format results with V/D/J gene assignments, CDR regions, and SHM identification.

name: extract_cdr3_from_airr
description: Extract CDR3 information from AIRR format results. Supports multiple species (human, mouse, rat, rabbit) and provides standardized CDR3 sequences for downstream analysis.

name: extract_seurat_umap_metadata
description: Extract UMAP coordinates and cellular metadata from Seurat RDS files. Returns CSV files with UMAP embeddings, cluster assignments, and cell type annotations.

name: integrate_scbcr_bulk_bcr_data
description: Integrate single-cell BCR and bulk BCR sequencing data. Combines scBCR UMAP annotations with bulk BCR sequences for comprehensive repertoire analysis.

name: integrate_binding_neutralization_experiments
description: Integrate antibody binding and neutralization experimental measurements. Standardizes experimental data and merges with sequence information for ML training.

name: integrate_predictions_with_experimental_data
description: Integrate machine learning prediction results with laboratory measurements. Creates comprehensive feature datasets for model validation and improvement.

name: metabcr
description: MetaBCR: A Deep Learning Framework for Antibody-Antigen Interaction Prediction. Predicts binding affinity for flu, SARS, RSV, HIV antigens with streaming progress.

name: bcell_celltype_visualization
description: Visualize B cell subtypes on UMAP with marker-based annotation. Annotates naive, memory, plasma, and GC B cells using canonical markers.

name: bcell_marker_dotplot
description: Generate DotPlot of B cell marker gene expression across subtypes. Supports custom marker gene lists and outputs publication-quality figures.

name: bcell_binding_visualization
description: Visualize BCR binding/antigen reactivity predictions on UMAP. Auto-detects binding score columns and generates spatial visualization.

name: bcell_trajectory_analysis
description: Perform B cell pseudotime trajectory analysis using Monocle3. Learns differentiation trajectories from naive to plasma cells.

name: bcell_shm_analysis
description: Analyze somatic hypermutation (SHM) rates from AIRR data. Calculates SHM rates in V, D, J regions and identifies mutation hotspots.

name: bcell_isotype_analysis
description: Analyze BCR isotype (immunoglobulin class) distribution. Extracts c_call column and computes isotype proportions across conditions.

name: bcell_clonotype_analysis
description: Analyze BCR clonotype expansion and clonal diversity. Calculates clonotype frequencies and identifies expanded clones.

name: bcell_vdj_analysis
description: Analyze V(D)J gene family usage from AIRR data. Extracts V/D/J gene calls and computes usage frequencies and heatmaps.

name: bcell_diversity_analysis
description: Calculate BCR repertoire diversity metrics grouped by a specified column. Computes Shannon entropy, Simpson index, and Hill diversity numbers.

name: bcell_deg_analysis
description: Perform differential gene expression analysis between two B cell groups. Identifies DEGs with statistical significance and fold-change thresholds.

name: bcell_gc_analysis
description: Analyze germinal center (GC) dynamics: Dark Zone vs Light Zone. Computes zone-specific gene expression and pathway enrichment.

name: bcell_plasma_prediction
description: Predict plasma cell differentiation potential using gene signatures. Computes differentiation scores and identifies plasma-biased cells.

name: bcell_maturation_analysis
description: Analyze affinity maturation by correlating SHM rates with pseudotime. Fits regression models to identify maturation-driven mutations.

name: bcell_cytotrace_analysis
description: Predict B cell differentiation state using CytoTRACE algorithm. CytoTRACE predicts differentiation potential from scRNA-seq data.

name: tcell_celltype_visualization
description: T cell subtype UMAP visualization and distribution analysis. Performs cell type annotation and visualization for CD4, CD8, Treg, and other T cell subsets.

name: tcell_marker_dotplot_analysis
description: T cell marker gene expression dotplot analysis. Creates a dotplot visualization of T cell subtype marker genes.

name: tcell_trajectory_analysis
description: T cell pseudotime trajectory analysis using monocle3. Performs pseudotime trajectory inference for T cell differentiation studies.

name: tcr_binding_visualization
description: TCR binding/reactivity prediction visualization. Visualizes TCR binding predictions on UMAP space for antigen-specific T cell analysis.

name: tcr_clonotype_analysis
description: TCR clonotype expansion analysis. Analyzes TCR clonotype diversity and expansion patterns across samples or conditions.

name: integrate_tcr_data_complete
description: Merge/integrate TCR prediction results (CSV) with RDS data. Combines NetTCR binding predictions, IgBLAST results, or any CSV output with Seurat RDS metadata by barcode matching. Use after any TCR analysis that produces CSV files.

name: immune_celltype_visualization
description: Unified immune cell type UMAP visualization and distribution analysis. Visualizes all immune cell types including T, B, NK, monocytes, and dendritic cells.

name: immune_marker_dotplot_analysis
description: Immune cell marker gene expression dotplot analysis. Creates a dotplot visualization of immune cell type marker genes.

name: immune_trajectory_analysis
description: Immune cell pseudotime trajectory analysis using monocle3. Performs pseudotime trajectory inference across immune cell lineages.

name: immune_deg_analysis
description: Differential expression gene analysis between immune cell types. Performs DEG analysis with statistical testing and volcano plot visualization.

name: immune_cellchat_analysis
description: Cell-cell communication analysis using CellChat. Analyzes cell-cell communication networks between immune cell types.

name: immune_isolate_cells
description: Isolate specific cell lineage from mixed population. Subsets a Seurat object to specific cell lineages (T cells, B cells, myeloid) for focused analysis.

name: immune_comprehensive_analysis
description: Quick comprehensive immune cell analysis pipeline. Runs CellType + DotPlot + DEG analysis in one step for rapid immune profiling.

name: integrate_bcr_data_complete
description: Complete BCR data integration pipeline with UMAP, clustering, and cell type annotation. Integrates AIRR format V(D)J data with Seurat single-cell objects.

name: run_figure2_analysis
description: Single-cell RNA-seq differential gene expression analysis and visualization. Generates figure 2 style DEG analysis for immune cell characterization.

name: run_figure3_analysis
description: Single-cell antigen binding prediction visualization and UMAP density analysis. Performs binding prediction visualization for paper figure 3.

name: run_figure4_analysis
description: Single-cell trajectory analysis and gene module scoring with pseudotime inference. Generates trajectory analysis for paper figure 4.

name: run_figure5_analysis
description: B-cell receptor isotype distribution and somatic hypermutation (SHM) rate analysis. Generates isotype/SHM analysis for paper figure 5.

name: predict_and_fix_ribonn_te
description: 自动修复 mRNA 序列文件中的 CDS 终止密码子缺失问题，并调用 RiboNN 模型预测翻译效率 (TE)。支持 Tab 或空格分隔的输入文件。

name: sort_ribonn_prediction_results
description: 对 RiboNN 生成的预测结果文件进行排序。自动识别 mRNA 变体分组（基于 tx_id），并根据指定的翻译效率 (TE) 指标进行降序排列。

name: generate_cds
description: 生成单条蛋白质对应的 CDS (编码序列)。使用 GeMoRNA AI 模型进行密码子优化。

name: generate_5utr
description: 生成 5'UTR 序列。使用 GeMoRNA de novo 生成高翻译效率的 5' 非翻译区。

name: generate_3utr
description: 生成 3'UTR 序列。使用 GeMoRNA 生成高稳定性的 3' 非翻译区。

name: generate_cds_from_file
description: 批量生成 CDS 并保存到文件。支持 FASTA/CSV 格式的蛋白质序列输入。

name: generate_full_mrna
description: 核心工具：生成完整 mRNA 序列 (5'UTR + CDS + 3'UTR)。一站式生成优化的治疗性 mRNA。

name: run_spired_fitness
description: 使用 SPIRED-Fitness 进行蛋白质结构适应度评分和稳定性预测。预测突变对蛋白质稳定性的影响。

name: foldx_saturation_scan
description: [FoldX] 饱和突变扫描 / 单点突变。支持 CIF/PDB 输入，自动 RepairPDB，生成 individual_list.txt 并运行 BuildModel。

name: combine_and_filter
description: 整合 FoldX 和 SPIRED-Fitness 结果并筛选最佳突变。智能查找结果文件，支持多指标排序和筛选。

name: infer_cdr1_cdr2_from_vgene
description: Infer CDR1 and CDR2 sequences from TCR V gene names (TRAV/TRBV) using IMGT germline reference data. Use when you have V gene names but need full CDR1-3 for NetTCR.

name: convert_tcr_to_nettcr_format
description: Batch convert TCR CSV with V gene columns to NetTCR format. Auto-detects column names, infers CDR1/CDR2 from V genes, outputs ready-to-use CSV for predict_tcr_binding_*.

name: optimize_codon_sequences
description: Batch optimize codons for protein sequences, support multiple input formats (CSV, TXT, FASTA), output DNA sequences

name: optimize_single_sequence
description: Optimize codons for a single protein sequence, support specified species, output DNA sequences

name: rinalmo_mcp_server
description: RiNALMo RNA language model for ribosome loading rate prediction. Pre-trained on millions of RNA sequences.

name: predict_tcr_binding_fast
description: Fast TCR-peptide binding prediction using pre-trained NetTCR-2.2 models. 20-model TFLite ensemble for instant prediction. Supports 26 peptide-specific models with percentile rank, plus pan-specific fallback. Auto-detects input format (native 7-CDR or legacy CDR3+V-genes).

name: predict_tcr_binding_ensemble
description: Ensemble TCR-peptide binding prediction (backward-compatible wrapper). In NetTCR-2.2, ensemble size is always 20 models (5-fold CV x 4 validation splits). Wraps predict_tcr_binding_fast for API compatibility.

name: predict_tcr_binding_complete
description: Complete NetTCR-2.2 prediction pipeline with statistics and report. Full pipeline: validates input -> resolves CDR1/CDR2 -> runs 20-model ensemble -> computes percentile rank -> classifies binders -> outputs prediction CSV, statistics CSV, and summary report.

name: validate_tcr_input
description: Validate TCR input data format for NetTCR-2.2. Checks native format (peptide/A1-A3/B1-B3) or legacy format (CDR3a/CDR3b + V genes). Validates sequence lengths, amino acid composition, and V gene resolution.

name: check_peptide_support
description: Check if peptides have pre-trained NetTCR-2.2 models. Checks against 26 pre-trained peptide-specific models. Peptides without models fall back to pan-specific prediction.

name: list_available_peptides
description: List all 26 peptides with pre-trained NetTCR-2.2 models. Returns peptide sequences, model counts, and negative control statistics. Pre-trained peptides support percentile rank rescaling.
